title: document scale (width only) is different after read & write
author: dogusev
body: Hi! Faced with a very strange issue: When I read the document and write it back as a new file without any changes width of columns became different. Input: output: here is input file [tov.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/3184310/tov.xlsx)

comments.author: dogusev
comments.body:
it seems that height also changed.
Probably related to Dpi parsing.

@guyonroche could you please take a look at this issue? It's quite critical for me.


What currently I found:
 1. In output document lost properties: 
    ```
    pageSetup.fitToPage
    useFirstPageNumber
    ```
2. in both (input output) parsed documents data set to default `horizontalDpi: 4294967295,
  verticalDpi: 4294967295,`

comments.author: dogusev
remi-guan
